text:
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Weekly Audit Health Report workflow failed on the mmmichaelllang/jeeves-unchained repository.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence summary noting an escalation from Andrew Lang requiring attention.
- [escalation] Sir Richard: Rich Lang forwarded a message from Alison Kling about Erin's show.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch continues a theological discussion thread about Vertical-Experiential Theology, sharing his perspective on ideological conflicts.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch reports bugs on the CG site including a broken Van Gogh button, navigation issues, and wordy homepage text.
- [scheduling] Alan Beasley: Alan Beasley shares a Zoom link for a Saturday morning meeting at 10am.
- [scheduling] Don Cooper: Don Cooper notes they did not schedule their next meeting and proposes another discussion.
- [scheduling] Alan Beasley: Alan Beasley confirms a Zoom meeting scheduled for Saturday morning at 10am Pacific Daylight Time.
- [follow up] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence summary from Jeeves system highlighting a pending message from Don Cooper requiring attention and scheduling response.
